description: Select specific columns from a dataframe using various selection criteria

variations.name: Select specific columns by name
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
selected = select_pipe | Select('customer_id', 'name', 'email')
result_df = selected.to_df()

variations.name: Select columns using startswith condition
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
user_cols = select_pipe | Select(startswith('user_'))
result_df = user_cols.to_df()

variations.name: Select columns using complex boolean logic
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
numeric_not_id = select_pipe | Select(numeric() & ~endswith('_id'))
result_df = numeric_not_id.to_df()

variations.name: Select columns using OR logic
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
user_or_customer = select_pipe | Select(startswith('user_') | startswith('customer_'))
result_df = user_or_customer.to_df()

variations.name: Select columns using AND logic
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
user_scores = select_pipe | Select(startswith('user_') & contains('score'))
result_df = user_scores.to_df()

description: Select all numeric columns from the dataframe

variations.name: Select all numeric columns
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
numeric_data = select_pipe | select_numeric()
result_df = numeric_data.to_df()

variations.name: Select numeric columns with specific data types
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
numeric_data = select_pipe | select_numeric(include=['int64', 'float64'])
result_df = numeric_data.to_df()

description: Select all string/text columns from the dataframe

variations.name: Select all string columns
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
text_data = select_pipe | select_strings()
result_df = text_data.to_df()

variations.name: Select string columns with specific data types
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
text_data = select_pipe | select_strings(include=['object', 'string'])
result_df = text_data.to_df()

description: Select all date and time columns from the dataframe

variations.name: Select all date columns
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
time_data = select_pipe | select_dates()
result_df = time_data.to_df()

variations.name: Select date columns with specific formats
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
time_data = select_pipe | select_dates(include=['datetime64', 'datetime64[ns]'])
result_df = time_data.to_df()

description: Select columns matching a regular expression pattern

variations.name: Select columns containing specific text
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
score_cols = select_pipe | select_by_pattern('.*score.*')
result_df = score_cols.to_df()

variations.name: Select columns with complex regex pattern
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
metric_cols = select_pipe | select_by_pattern('^(user|customer)_.*_(score|rating|index)$')
result_df = metric_cols.to_df()

description: Select columns ending with a specific suffix

variations.name: Select columns ending with specific suffix
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
date_cols = select_pipe | select_by_suffix('_date')
result_df = date_cols.to_df()

variations.name: Select columns ending with multiple suffixes
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
time_cols = select_pipe | select_by_suffix(['_date', '_time', '_timestamp'])
result_df = time_cols.to_df()

description: Select columns starting with a specific prefix

variations.name: Select columns starting with specific prefix
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
product_cols = select_pipe | select_by_prefix('product_')
result_df = product_cols.to_df()

variations.name: Select columns starting with multiple prefixes
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
user_customer_cols = select_pipe | select_by_prefix(['user_', 'customer_'])
result_df = user_customer_cols.to_df()

description: Remove specific columns from the dataframe

variations.name: Remove specific columns by name
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
clean_data = select_pipe | Deselect('password', 'ssn', 'credit_card')
result_df = clean_data.to_df()

variations.name: Remove columns using contains condition
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
clean_data = select_pipe | Deselect(contains('temp'), contains('debug'))
result_df = clean_data.to_df()

variations.name: Remove columns using complex conditions
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
clean_data = select_pipe | Deselect(contains('internal') | contains('test'))
result_df = clean_data.to_df()

variations.name: Rename columns using dictionary mapping
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
renamed = select_pipe | Rename({
    'user_id': 'customer_id',
    'first_name': 'first',
    'last_name': 'last',
    'total_spent': 'spending'
})
result_df = renamed.to_df()

variations.name: Rename columns using function
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
renamed = select_pipe | Rename(lambda col: col.lower().replace('_', ' '))
result_df = renamed.to_df()

variations.name: Reorder columns to specific order
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
reordered = select_pipe | Reorder('customer_id', 'created_date', 'updated_date', 'name', 'email')
result_df = reordered.to_df()

variations.name: Reorder columns with partial specification
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
reordered = select_pipe | Reorder('customer_id', 'name', 'email')
result_df = reordered.to_df()

description: Add new computed columns to the dataframe

variations.name: Add calculated columns using lambda functions
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
enhanced = select_pipe | AddColumns({
    'revenue': lambda df: df['quantity'] * df['price'],
    'profit': lambda df: (df['quantity'] * df['price']) - (df['quantity'] * df['cost']),
    'profit_margin': lambda df: ((df['quantity'] * df['price']) - (df['quantity'] * df['cost'])) / (df['quantity'] * df['price'])
})
result_df = enhanced.to_df()

variations.name: Add conditional columns

new_columns.category_tier: lambda df: df['amount'].apply(lambda x: 'High' if x > 1000 else 'Medium' if x > 500 else 'Low')

description: Preview what columns would be selected without applying the selection

variations.name: Preview selection with multiple conditions
variations.example:
preview = preview_selection(data, startswith('user_'), contains('score'))
print(f"Selected columns: {preview['selected_columns']}")
print(f"Total columns: {preview['total_columns']}")

variations.name: Preview complex selection logic
variations.example:
preview = preview_selection(data, numeric() & ~endswith('_id'))
print(f"Selected columns: {preview['selected_columns']}")
print(f"Selection criteria: {preview['criteria']}")

description: Get a summary of the current selection state and history

variations.name: Get basic selection summary
variations.example:
summary = select_pipe.get_selection_summary()
print(f"Selected columns: {summary['selected_columns']}")
print(f"Total available: {summary['total_available_columns']}")

variations.name: Get detailed selection history
variations.example:
summary = select_pipe.get_selection_summary(include_history=True)
print(f"Selection history: {summary['selection_history']}")
print(f"Current state: {summary['current_state']}")

description: Create SelectPipe from database engine for efficient data loading

variations.name: Create SelectPipe from database table
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_engine(database_engine, 'large_table')
all_cols = select_pipe | Select('*')
result_df = all_cols.to_df()

variations.name: Create SelectPipe with specific columns
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_engine(database_engine, 'large_table')
selected = select_pipe | Select('customer_id', 'name', 'email', 'total_spent')
result_df = selected.to_df()

description: Execute multiple selection operations in sequence

variations.name: Customer analysis pipeline
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
customer_analysis = (select_pipe
    | Select('customer_id', 'name', 'email', 'total_spent', 'visit_count')
    | Rename({'total_spent': 'spending', 'visit_count': 'visits'})
    | AddColumns({'avg_spend_per_visit': lambda df: df['spending'] / df['visits']})
    | Reorder('customer_id', 'name', 'email', 'spending', 'visits', 'avg_spend_per_visit')
)
result_df = customer_analysis.to_df()

variations.name: Financial reporting pipeline
Data cleaning pipeline
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
clean_data = (select_pipe
    | Deselect(contains('temp'), contains('debug'), contains('internal'))
    | Rename({
        'user_id': 'customer_id',
        'first_name': 'first',
        'last_name': 'last'
    })
    | Reorder('customer_id', 'first', 'last', 'email')
)
result_df = clean_data.to_df()

variations.name: Machine learning feature selection pipeline
variations.example:
select_pipe = SelectPipe.from_dataframe(data)
features = (select_pipe
    | select_numeric()
    | Select(contains('feature'), contains('metric'), contains('score'))
    | Deselect(contains('target'), contains('label'), contains('id'))
)
result_df = features.to_df()
